description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named 'CI: run TCMalloc test' that runs on push to master and main branches, on pull request open and synchronize, and on merge group checks requested. The workflow should also be dispatchable with an optional debug input. It should find changed files, then test with TCMalloc on an ubuntu-24.04 environment, setting up Bazel and Python with caching, installing dependencies, and running C++ tests.
